balanced.name: Balanced (Recommended)
balanced.description: Optimized for research depth + breadth. NLP focus with CV for VLM synergy.

semesters.name: Semester 1 – Summer 2026
semesters.notes: Foundation semester. NLP + ML + Robotics + CV. Heavy but essential for unlocking everything.

semesters.name: Semester 2 – Winter 2026/27
semesters.notes: Research-intensive. NLP Lab (main lab) + LLM Seminar + Robot Learning + Self-supervised Learning. Build lab relationships.

semesters.name: Semester 3 – Summer 2027
semesters.notes: Advanced courses. Lighter load to prepare thesis. VLMs in Adv. CV, IR for RAG, RL if offered. Start thesis search.

semesters.name: Semester 4 – Winter 2027/28
semesters.notes: Master Thesis + Master Seminar. Full focus on research. Target: CAISA Lab (NLP/LLM) or AIS Lab (Robotics).

balanced.notes: Need ~18 more ECTS. Options: Cryptography (AL, 9 CP), any ICM courses (6 CP each), or additional IS courses. The 102 CP shown + thesis 32 = 134 total, which is ~14 over 120 — perfect for grade optimization.

nlpFocused.name: NLP/LLM Focused
nlpFocused.description: Maximum NLP depth. All CAISA Lab courses. Best for NLP PhD.

semesters.name: Semester 1 – Summer 2026
semesters.notes: Heavy math + NLP foundations. FoDS is 9 ECTS and demanding.

semesters.name: Semester 2 – Winter 2026/27
semesters.notes: Full CAISA immersion: NLP Lab + NLP Seminar + AI Alignment Lab. Two labs in one semester is intense.

semesters.name: Semester 3 – Summer 2027
semesters.notes: CV for VLM context + IR for RAG + Crypto for AL breadth.

semesters.name: Semester 4 – Winter 2027/28
semesters.notes: CAISA Lab thesis on LLMs/NLP/AI alignment.

ambitious.name: Ambitious (Research-Max)
ambitious.description: Maximum research exposure. Overloaded semesters. For extreme motivation.

semesters.name: Semester 1 – Summer 2026
semesters.notes: 33 ECTS first semester. Only for those confident in their foundations.

semesters.name: Semester 2 – Winter 2026/27
semesters.notes: NLP Lab + LLM Seminar + Robot Learning + Self-supervised + IR. Massive workload.

semesters.name: Semester 3 – Summer 2027
semesters.notes: Advanced CV + RL + AI Alignment Lab. Begin thesis preparation.
